table.title: Table
table.pauseFailed: Couldn't change the AI DM's pause state.
table.emptyHint: Type an action below to begin the scene.
table.composerPlaceholderCombat: Combat is live — describe your action…
table.composerLockedHuman: A human has taken the DM seat.
table.composerLockedAwaiting: Waiting on the rest of the table…
table.viewerHint: You're watching as a viewer — only players can act.
table.systemTakeover: A human took over the DM seat.
table.offHint: No AI is running this table. The DM can switch on Driver mode (the AI acts directly as the DM) or Co-DM mode (the AI only proposes) in settings.
table.coDmHint: In Co-DM mode the AI only proposes — every draft waits for a human DM to approve, and nothing changes until then. There's no live table to play at. Switch to Driver mode to let the AI hold the DM seat and act directly.
